title: Algedonic Ales — Primary Logo
description: Primary brand mark in full-color, 1-color, and reversed variants. Use the full-color version on white/light backgrounds; reversed on dark backgrounds.

title: Algedonic Ales Brand Book
description: Brand standards: typography (Inter for body, Arboria Bold for headlines), color palette (algedonic copper #b45309, cellar slate #1c1917, foam ivory #fafaf9), voice & tone, lockup spacing, and logo do/don't.

title: Brewery Exterior — Front Elevation
description: Daytime exterior photo of the brewhouse front. Use for press kit + the brewery's About page on the website.

title: Taproom — Interior Wide Shot
description: Wide-angle of the taproom in evening service. Bartenders pulling pints, patrons at communal tables. Approved for hospitality industry trade press.

title: Team Portrait — 2026
description: Annual team portrait outside the brewhouse. Updated each spring after seasonal hiring lands.

title: Pale Ale — 12oz Can Label
description: 12oz can wrap for FP-PALE-1-2-BBL retail packaging. Print-ready CMYK + spot. Includes ABV / IBU / nutritional + TTB-compliant government warning.

title: Pale Ale — 1/2-BBL Keg Collar Sticker
description: Wholesale keg collar sticker for FP-PALE-1-2-BBL. Includes batch field for the cellar to handwrite the lot number at fill.

title: Pale Ale — 1/6-BBL Sixtel Sticker
description: Sixtel keg sticker for FP-PALE-1-6-BBL. Smaller format than the 1/2-BBL sticker; designed for tighter keg collar.

title: West Coast IPA — 12oz Can Label
description: 12oz can wrap for the West Coast IPA. Hop-leaf foreground, citrus burst, copper accents. TTB-compliant.

title: West Coast IPA — 1/2-BBL Keg Sticker
description: Wholesale keg collar sticker for FP-IPA-1-2-BBL.

title: West Coast IPA — 1/6-BBL Sixtel Sticker
description: Sixtel keg sticker for FP-IPA-1-6-BBL — the highest-volume wholesale SKU at the brewery.

title: Dry Irish Stout — 12oz Can Label
description: 12oz can wrap for the Dry Irish Stout. Heavy black field, cream-coloured wordmark, harp motif tucked in the lockup.

title: Dry Irish Stout — 1/2-BBL Keg Sticker
description: Wholesale keg collar sticker for FP-STOUT-1-2-BBL.

title: Dry Irish Stout — 1/6-BBL Sixtel Sticker
description: Sixtel keg sticker for FP-STOUT-1-6-BBL — sized for nitro-tap accounts.

title: Czech Pilsner — 12oz Can Label
description: 12oz can wrap for the Czech Pilsner. Pale gold field, traditional script, restrained ornament.

title: Czech Pilsner — 1/2-BBL Keg Sticker
description: Wholesale keg collar sticker for FP-LAGER-1-2-BBL.

title: Czech Pilsner — 1/6-BBL Sixtel Sticker
description: Sixtel keg sticker for FP-LAGER-1-6-BBL.

title: Hazy IPA — 12oz Can Label
description: 12oz can wrap for the Hazy IPA. Soft-focus citrus illustration, oat-grain pattern band, 'Drink Fresh — Best Within 60 Days' callout to nudge tap-room turnover.

title: Hazy IPA — 1/2-BBL Keg Sticker
description: Wholesale keg collar sticker for FP-HAZY-1-2-BBL. Date-of-package field is required because hazies oxidize fast.

title: Hazy IPA — 1/6-BBL Sixtel Sticker
description: Sixtel keg sticker for FP-HAZY-1-6-BBL — the dominant hazy SKU at the brewery; sixtels turn over fastest.

title: Pale Ale — Tap Handle
description: Wood-and-printed-acrylic tap handle. Shop drawing PDF (vendor: Taphandles Co.) plus the artwork insert. Reorder qty 50 minimum.

title: West Coast IPA — Tap Handle
description: Same shape as the Pale tap handle; copper-and-cream colorway with hop-cone graphic.

title: Dry Irish Stout — Tap Handle
description: Black field, cream wordmark, harp motif. Designed to read at distance over a busy bar.

title: Czech Pilsner — Tap Handle
description: Pale gold + cream colorway with traditional script. Works on both production and event lines.

title: Hazy IPA — Tap Handle
description: Soft-focus citrus illustration on translucent acrylic. The bar gets a freshness-callout sticker (separate asset) when a fresh keg lands.

title: Pale Ale — Wholesale Sales Sheet
description: One-pager for distributor reps. Cover specs (5.4% ABV, 38 IBU), tasting notes, food pairings, suggested retail pricing, MOQ + lead time.

title: West Coast IPA — Wholesale Sales Sheet
description: Distributor sales sheet for the brewery's flagship IPA. Cascade + Centennial dry-hop specs, 6.8% ABV, 65 IBU, recommended pour temp 42°F.

title: Dry Irish Stout — Wholesale Sales Sheet
description: Distributor sales sheet for the dry Irish stout. Roast-malt notes, 4.6% ABV, 30 IBU, English ale yeast. Pours best on nitro.

title: Czech Pilsner — Wholesale Sales Sheet
description: Distributor sales sheet for the Czech-style pilsner. Pilsner malt + noble hops + lager yeast, 4.8% ABV, 38 IBU.

title: Hazy IPA — Wholesale Sales Sheet
description: Distributor sales sheet for the hazy. 6.5% ABV, 50 IBU, biotransformation dry hop with Citra + Mosaic. Best within 60 days of pack.

title: Social — New Release Announcement
description: Instagram + Facebook template for new-release announcements. 1080×1080 master + 1080×1920 story crop. Drop in the beer name + release date + on-tap location.

title: Social — Now Pouring
description: Generic 'now pouring at [bar]' template for wholesale-account share-outs. Tagged accounts get reposted to the brewery's main feed.

title: Social — Seasonal Drop
description: Quarterly seasonal-release post template. Background art swaps per season; lockup + CTA pin stay the same.

title: Social — Festival Appearance
description: Festival booth appearance template. Drop in festival name + dates + booth number + which beers are pouring.

title: Social — Charity Pour-Out
description: Charity collaboration template — used when the brewery donates a portion of taproom proceeds to a partner org.

title: Wholesale Price List — 2026
description: 12-month wholesale price list for distributor + bar accounts. Includes all 5 beer styles × 1/2-BBL + 1/6-BBL formats, pallet pricing, MOQ, lead time, payment terms (net 30).

title: Wholesale Account Application
description: New account onboarding form. Captures business legal name, ABC license number, federal TTB permit, AP contact, delivery instructions. Bookkeeping needs the W-9 attached.

title: Distributor Pitch Deck — 2026
description: 12-slide deck for new-distributor pitches. Brewery story, product mix, production capacity (250-BBL brewhouse, 8 fermenters), category-leader positioning per style, growth numbers.

title: New Account — Welcome One-Pager
description: First-keg-delivered one-pager. Cellar handling tips, line-cleaning cadence, who to call for re-orders / damaged kegs / draft system issues.

title: Spring Seasonal — Saison Estival 2026
description: Spring 2026 seasonal release artwork: Saison Estival (farmhouse-style ale with chamomile + lemon zest). Includes 12oz can wrap, tap handle insert, social drops.

title: Summer Seasonal — Hopfest IPA 2026
description: Summer 2026 seasonal: a fresh-hop IPA released within 7 days of harvest at Cascade Hop Yards. Time-sensitive — print artwork only after the harvest yield is locked.

title: Fall Seasonal — Algedonic Märzen 2026
description: Fall 2026 Oktoberfest-style märzen lager. 5.8% ABV, slightly toasted Munich malt backbone. Released first week of September.

title: Winter Seasonal — Cellar Reserve 2026
description: Winter 2026 barrel-aged imperial stout. 11.2% ABV, 18 months in retired bourbon barrels. Released Black Friday; allocated 1 case per wholesale account.
